title: TIER_2 Repo With Configure=PASS (Tier Contract Violation)
description: The baseline manifest is edited to set NGKs_Zohan (a TIER_2 repo) configure=PASS and build=PASS. TIER_2 repos are required to have configure=N/A in the baseline. This tier contract violation is detected by certify-baseline and reported as a REGRESSION regardless of the actual build outcome.
